news.title: Nonverbal 6-year-old exposed to meth; mother arrested
news.summary: A metro Atlanta mother is in jail, accused of exposing her nonverbal son with autism to meth.

news.title: Shelia Ann Nichols: Georgia woman ID-ed in 1983 Everglades murder mystery
news.summary: Florida investigators identified a teenager from Decatur who vanished in 1983 and was found dead in the Florida Everglades.

news.title: Sparks fly as surveillance video shows thief break into metro dealership, steal $100,000 SUV
news.summary: A thief stole a $100,000 Lexus SUV from a Cobb County dealership. Police are investigating, and a $5,000 reward is offered.

news.title: 75-year-old community volunteer shot in East Point
news.summary: A 75-year-old woman was injured in a shooting Wednesday morning, according to East Point police.

news.title: Man seriously injured in DeKalb County shooting
news.summary: An investigation is underway after a person was seriously injured in a shooting in DeKalb County.

news.title: 1 person seriously injured in DeKalb County shooting
news.summary: DeKalb County police are investigating a shooting Wednesday afternoon on Blazing Pine Path in Decatur.

news.title: 1 person hospitalized with serious injuries after shooting in Decatur, police say
news.summary: DeKalb County Police responded to the scene located at 3490 Blazing Pine Path and located a person who had been shot.

news.title: Grandmother charged in drowning death of 2-year-old at Roswell apartments, warrants reveal
news.summary: Warrants state that the grandmother's neglect ultimately resulted in Delgado's death.

news.title: Louisiana man accused of two I-85 road rage shootings in less than 24 hours in Troup County
news.summary: “You never know what kind of day that other person is having that cut you off and you blow the horn, or you give them the finger.”
